to-kill-a-mockingbird.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
to-kill-a-mockingbird.author: Harper Lee
to-kill-a-mockingbird.notes: Highest readership of ANY banned book. Perennially challenged. Essential.

maus.title: Maus
maus.author: Art Spiegelman
maus.notes: Pulitzer Prize. McMinn County TN ban went viral. Holocaust graphic novel classic.

the-catcher-in-the-rye.title: The Catcher in the Rye
the-catcher-in-the-rye.author: J.D. Salinger
the-catcher-in-the-rye.notes: Most iconic banned book in America. Perennially challenged since 1951.

fahrenheit-451.title: Fahrenheit 451
fahrenheit-451.author: Ray Bradbury
fahrenheit-451.notes: Ironic: book about book burning gets banned. All-time classic.

of-mice-and-men.title: Of Mice and Men
of-mice-and-men.author: John Steinbeck
of-mice-and-men.notes: ALA top 100 every decade. School curriculum staple.

the-adventures-of-huckleberry-finn.title: The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn
the-adventures-of-huckleberry-finn.author: Mark Twain
the-adventures-of-huckleberry-finn.notes: Most banned American classic. N-word controversy.

i-know-why-the-caged-bird-sings.title: I Know Why the Caged Bird Sings
i-know-why-the-caged-bird-sings.author: Maya Angelou
i-know-why-the-caged-bird-sings.notes: #50 PEN cumulative. ALA perennial. American classic memoir.

the-diary-of-a-young-girl.title: The Diary of a Young Girl
the-diary-of-a-young-girl.author: Anne Frank
the-diary-of-a-young-girl.notes: Anne Frank. Holocaust. Iconic and perennially challenged.

harry-potter.title: Harry Potter (series)
harry-potter.author: J.K. Rowling
harry-potter.notes: #1 ALA 2000-2009. Massive cultural phenomenon. Witchcraft bans.

the-hunger-games.title: The Hunger Games
the-hunger-games.author: Suzanne Collins
the-hunger-games.notes: ALA top 100 2010-2019. Massive franchise (film, merch, cultural).

the-giver.title: The Giver
the-giver.author: Lois Lowry
the-giver.notes: Newbery Medal. Dystopian classic. Perennially challenged.

drama-a-graphic-novel.title: Drama: A Graphic Novel
drama-a-graphic-novel.author: Raina Telgemeier
drama-a-graphic-novel.notes: Stonewall Honor. Bestselling graphic novel. Middle grade. Trending ban.

eleanor-and-park.title: Eleanor & Park
eleanor-and-park.author: Rainbow Rowell
eleanor-and-park.notes: #1 NYT. Major YA romance. Recent high-ban count.

the-glass-castle.title: The Glass Castle
the-glass-castle.author: Jeannette Walls
the-glass-castle.notes: #1 NYT memoir. ALA top 100. Huge readership.

and-tango-makes-three.title: And Tango Makes Three
and-tango-makes-three.author: Justin Richardson & Peter Parnell
and-tango-makes-three.notes: #1 most banned picture book. Gay penguins. Iconic LGBTQ+ symbol.

captain-underpants.title: Captain Underpants (series)
captain-underpants.author: Dav Pilkey
captain-underpants.notes: #2 ALA 2010-2019. Kids' favorite. Potty humor bans.

fun-home.title: Fun Home
fun-home.author: Alison Bechdel
fun-home.notes: ALA top 100. Tony Award musical. Lesbian graphic memoir.

watchmen.title: Watchmen
watchmen.author: Alan Moore & Dave Gibbons
watchmen.notes: Eisner Award. Time 100 best. HBO series. Graphic novel masterpiece.

lolita.title: Lolita
lolita.author: Vladimir Nabokov
lolita.notes: Literary classic. Notoriously controversial. Major readership.

lord-of-the-flies-book.title: Lord of the Flies
lord-of-the-flies-book.author: William Golding
lord-of-the-flies-book.notes: Nobel Prize author. School curriculum staple.

gone-with-the-wind.title: Gone with the Wind
gone-with-the-wind.author: Margaret Mitchell
gone-with-the-wind.notes: Pulitzer Prize. All-time classic. Racism controversy.

the-curious-incident-of-the-dog-in-the-n.title: The Curious Incident of the Dog in the Night-Time
the-curious-incident-of-the-dog-in-the-n.author: Mark Haddon
the-curious-incident-of-the-dog-in-the-n.notes: ALA top 100. Whitbread Award. Tony Award play.

saga-series.title: Saga (series)
saga-series.author: Brian K. Vaughan
saga-series.notes: Eisner Awards. Hugo Award. Graphic novel masterpiece.

a-day-in-the-life-of-marlon-bundo.title: A Day in the Life of Marlon Bundo
a-day-in-the-life-of-marlon-bundo.author: Jill Twiss
a-day-in-the-life-of-marlon-bundo.notes: John Oliver's LGBT bunny book. Political satire.

sex-is-a-funny-word.title: Sex is a Funny Word
sex-is-a-funny-word.author: Cory Silverberg
sex-is-a-funny-word.notes: ALA top 100 2010-2019. Sex ed for kids.
